title: lilium tenuifolium f. chrysanthum
intro: Lilium tenuifolium f. chrysanthum, also known as the golden lily or chrysanthum lily, is a variety of the lily plant that is native to China and Japan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and skin conditions. The health benefits of Lilium tenuifolium f. chrysanthum include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting overall well-being. In herbal preparations, it is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, and can also be used as a topical treatment for skin conditions and wounds.
